mapper.insert: insert into employment (user_id, company_name, position, department, start_date, end_date, achievement) values (#{userId}, #{companyName}, #{position}, #{department}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{achievement})
mapper.update:
update employment
company_name=#{updateParam.companyName},
position=#{updateParam.position},
department=#{updateParam.department},
start_date=#{updateParam.startDate},
end_date=#{updateParam.endDate},
achievement=#{updateParam.achievement},
where id = #{id}
